title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Google announced new AI models and agentic tools at its developer conference to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic. The releases target Google's broad user base seeking more advanced AI capabilities.
content: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.

zh.title: 谷歌推出新AI模型和个人AI代理，努力与OpenAI和Anthropic保持步伐
zh.summary: 谷歌在其开发者大会上宣布了新的AI模型和代理工具，以与OpenAI和Anthropic竞争。这些发布针对寻求更先进AI能力的谷歌广泛用户基础。

title: Mortgage rates surge to highest level since July
summary: Mortgage rates reached their highest level since July amid ongoing uncertainty about the Iran conflict. The surge reflects broader market concerns about geopolitical tensions affecting borrowing costs.
content: Mortgage rates continued to move higher Tuesday on uncertainty over the war with Iran. They are at the highest level since last July.

zh.title: 抵押贷款利率升至自七月以来的最高水平
zh.summary: 在伊朗冲突持续不确定的情况下，抵押贷款利率达到自七月以来的最高水平。这一上升反映了更广泛的市场对地缘政治紧张局势影响借贷成本的担忧。

title: Blanche won't rule out Jan. 6 rioters getting Trump DOJ fund payouts
summary: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche declined to rule out providing payouts from Trump's DOJ "anti-weaponization" fund to January 6 Capitol riot participants. The statement suggests a potential shift in how the administration treats those involved in the 2021 incident.
content: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche would not rule out Jan. 6 rioters receiving payouts from Trump’s new DOJ "anti-weaponization" fund.

zh.title: Blanche不排除1月6日暴乱者获得Trump司法部基金赔付的可能性
zh.summary: 代理司法部长Todd Blanche拒绝排除从Trump司法部"反武器化"基金向1月6日国会暴乱参与者提供赔付的可能性。该声明表明政府在如何对待2021年事件参与者的态度可能发生转变。

title: Faisal Islam: Why a full HS2 line could still be built despite the latest fiasco
summary: The Transport Secretary announced the high-speed rail line will not be completed until 2039, despite recent project setbacks. The statement suggests momentum remains for eventually completing the full HS2 route.
content: The Transport Secretary has said the high-speed rail line will not be completed until 2039.

zh.title: 法萨尔·伊斯兰：尽管最近陷入困境，为什么仍然可能建成全面的HS2线路
zh.summary: 交通大臣宣布，尽管项目最近遭遇挫折，高速铁路线路将不会在2039年之前完成。该声明表明仍然有动力最终完成完整的HS2路线。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Marvell, Micron, Akamai, Shake Shack & more
summary: Marvell, Micron, Akamai, Shake Shack and other stocks were recording significant midday trading moves. The article highlights companies capturing market attention through their price movements.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 中午时段涨跌幅最大的股票：美满电子、美光、Akamai、Shake Shack等
zh.summary: 美满电子、美光、Akamai、Shake Shack及其他股票在中午时段记录了重大交易波动。该文章突出了这些公司通过价格波动吸引市场关注的情况。

title: How to avoid the travel fees quietly inflating your vacation costs
summary: Airline and hotel credit cards can help travelers reduce checked bag fees and resort charges, lowering overall vacation expenses. Strategic use of these financial products offers substantial savings opportunities.
content: Financial products like airline and hotel credit cards can save you on checked bag and resort fees.

zh.title: 如何避免悄悄增加您假期成本的旅行费用
zh.summary: 航空公司和酒店信用卡可以帮助旅行者减少行李托运费和度假村费用，降低整体假期开支。战略性使用这些金融产品可以提供可观的节省机会。

title: Supermarkets urged to limit food prices by government
summary: The government is urging supermarkets to voluntarily cap prices on essential groceries including eggs, bread, and milk. The initiative seeks to address food inflation concerns without implementing mandatory price controls.
content: Any price caps would be voluntary apply to key groceries such as eggs, bread, and milk, the BBC understands.

zh.title: 政府敦促超市限制食品价格
zh.summary: 政府敦促超市自愿限制包括鸡蛋、面包和牛奶在内的生活必需品价格。该举措旨在应对食品通胀问题，而无需实施强制性价格管制。

title: Trump flexes endorsement power for Ken Paxton after ousting Cassidy, targeting Massie
summary: President Trump endorsed Ken Paxton in a contested Texas Senate runoff against John Cornyn, demonstrating significant influence within Republican politics. The endorsement reflects Trump's efforts to shape party direction through his political backing.
content: Paxton and Cornyn are locked in a bitter Texas Senate runoff that will decide which Republican faces Democrat James Talarico in November.

zh.title: 特朗普为肯·帕克斯顿背书，展示共和党影响力
zh.summary: 特朗普在争议激烈的德州参议院径赛中背书肯·帕克斯顿对阵约翰·科尼恩，展现了他在共和党政治中的重大影响力。该背书反映了特朗普通过政治支持来塑造党派方向的努力。

title: Elon Musk ditched California, but the state will get a much-needed win from SpaceX’s IPO
summary: Despite relocating SpaceX and Tesla headquarters from California, the state stands to benefit from SpaceX's upcoming IPO. Many current and former employees of both companies maintain California residency.
content: Elon Musk stormed out of the state and took the headquarters of SpaceX and Tesla with him. But many current and former employees still call it home.

zh.title: 马斯克离开加州，但加州将从SpaceX上市中受益
zh.summary: 尽管SpaceX和特斯拉总部从加州迁出，但该州仍将受益于SpaceX即将上市。两家公司的许多现任和前任员工仍在加州居住。

title: Is RFK’s ‘carnivore diet’ healthy? Here’s what you need to know.
summary: Limited high-quality research supports the carnivore diet's claimed health benefits, including visceral fat reduction. Health experts caution that consumers should approach this dietary approach with skepticism pending stronger evidence.
content: There isn’t much high-quality research linking the carnivore diet with beneficial long-term health outcomes like eliminating visceral fat. People should know that.

zh.title: 肉食饮食对健康有益吗？以下是你需要了解的内容
zh.summary: 有限的高质量研究支持肉食饮食所声称的健康益处，包括内脏脂肪减少。健康专家警告消费者在获得更强有力的证据前应该对这种饮食方式持怀疑态度。

title: NS&I to begin contacting victims of lost funds scandal
summary: National Savings & Investments (NS&I) is contacting over 30,000 affected customers unable to access funds due to a system error. The error failed to identify all products held by deceased customers' estates.
content: Over 30,000 estates could not be accessed due to an error identifying all of a late customer's NS&I products.

zh.title: NS&I开始联系失款丑闻受害者
zh.summary: 国家储蓄和投资局（NS&I）正在联系超过30,000名因系统错误无法访问资金的受影响客户。该错误未能识别已故客户遗产持有的所有产品。

title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.19%, highest since before the financial crisis
summary: The 30-year Treasury yield surged above 5.19%, its highest level since before the 2008 financial crisis, as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation concerns. Global bond markets remain volatile amid these economic worries.
content: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears.

zh.title: 30年期国债收益率超过5.19%，创金融危机前以来新高
zh.summary: 30年期国债收益率飙升至5.19%以上，这是2008年金融危机前以来的最高水平。交易者密切关注央行对通胀担忧重现的回应，全球债券市场在这些经济忧虑中保持波动。

title: These stocks typically move the most on Nvidia's earnings. Some of the names may surprise you
summary: CNBC identified S&P 500 stocks historically most responsive to Nvidia earnings reports, with some surprising selections included. The analysis reveals which companies are most sensitive to Nvidia's financial performance.
content: CNBC screened the S&P 500 for stocks that have historically reacted most strongly to Nvidia earnings reports.

zh.title: 这些股票通常在英伟达财报公布时波动最大。其中一些公司名称可能会让你惊讶
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司商业频道(CNBC)确定了标准普尔500指数中对英伟达财报历来最敏感的股票,包括一些出人意料的选择。该分析揭示了哪些公司对英伟达的财务表现最敏感。

title: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision before he postponed it
summary: President Trump stated he was on the verge of ordering a military strike on Iran but chose to postpone, allowing the country days to negotiate. A decision could come within days or by early next week, Trump indicated.
content: Asked how long Iran has to come to the table, Trump said it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.

zh.title: 特朗普称他在推迟伊朗打击决定前"差一小时"就要下令了
zh.summary: 总统特朗普表示,他曾打算下令对伊朗进行军事打击,但选择了推迟,给予该国数天时间进行谈判。特朗普表示,决定可能会在数天内或下周初做出。

title: Is Nvidia spending its cash on the right things? Investors will soon get an update.
summary: Nvidia currently pays a nominal dividend while investors question whether the company should increase shareholder payouts or pursue alternative capital uses. The company's upcoming earnings report will reveal its capital allocation priorities.
content: Nvidia pays a “token” dividend, and while an increased payout could broaden the stock’s investor base, the company has been finding other uses for its cash.

zh.title: 英伟达是否将现金花在正确的事情上?投资者很快就会获得最新信息
zh.summary: 英伟达目前支付名义股息,投资者质疑该公司是否应该增加股东回报或追求其他资本用途。该公司即将发布的财报将揭示其资本配置优先事项。

title: Musk and Altman take their battle from court to Wall Street ahead of landmark IPOs
summary: After their court case concluded, Musk and Altman are now focusing on taking their respective companies public. This signals a shift from legal battles to financial markets competition.
content: Now that the Musk-Altman trial has reached a verdict, the two billionaires can turn their attention to readying their companies for the public market.

zh.title: 马斯克和奥特曼将战争从法庭转向华尔街，为标志性IPO做准备
zh.summary: 在法律诉讼结束后，马斯克和奥特曼现在专注于各自公司的上市。这标志着从法律战争向金融市场竞争的转变。

title: Investors are unprotected against oil and yield shocks. Here are the stocks to buy and avoid.
summary: Evercore strategists recommend 'all-weather' stocks for investors facing increasing risks from oil price volatility and yield fluctuations. These defensive positions are seen as outperformers during uncertain economic conditions.
content: Evercore strategists say as risks build for stocks, less-protected investors need more of these “all-weather” outperforming stocks.

zh.title: 投资者面临油价和收益率冲击的保护不足。以下是要购买和避免的股票。
zh.summary: Evercore策略师建议面临油价波动和收益率波动风险的投资者购买"全天候"股票。这些防守性头寸被视为在经济不确定时期的表现超群者。

title: Home Depot’s stock turns lower as a sales miss offsets a ‘mildly positive’ outlook
summary: Home Depot's stock declined despite beating earnings expectations because comparable-store sales grew slower than Wall Street anticipated. The disappointing sales growth overshadowed the otherwise positive earnings performance.
content: Home Depot’s stock falls as earnings beat expectations but comparable sales rose less than Wall Street expected.

zh.title: 家得宝股票下跌，销售不达预期抵消"温和乐观"前景
zh.summary: 家得宝股票下跌，尽管盈利超预期，但同店销售增长低于华尔街预期。令人失望的销售增长掩盖了其他方面的正面盈利表现。

title: Investors haven’t been this bullish since the peak of the 2021 meme-stock frenzy, according to this chart
summary: By certain metrics, investor bullishness has reached levels not seen since the 2021 meme-stock bubble, indicating extreme market optimism. This suggests potential vulnerability to a significant market correction.
content: By one measure, investors haven’t been this bulled up on stocks since the heady days of the original meme-stock frenzy back in 2021.

zh.title: 投资者对市场的看好程度自2021年迷因股狂潮的高峰以来前所未有
zh.summary: 从某些指标看，投资者看好程度达到2021年迷因股泡沫以来未曾出现的水平，反映极端市场乐观情绪。这表明市场容易发生严重调整。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
summary: Jim Cramer highlights oil prices and bond yields as key factors to monitor in stock market movements Tuesday. These macro indicators are expected to significantly influence trading activity.
content: Oil prices and bond yields are sticking points.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默提出周二股市需要关注的十大事项
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默强调油价和债券收益率是周二股市波动中需要关注的关键因素。这些宏观指标预计将显著影响交易活动。

title: HS2 costs could top £100bn and trains will be slower than first planned
summary: The UK's HS2 rail project is undergoing a 'reset' with revised cost estimates exceeding £100 billion and slower train speeds than originally promised. This marks another major revision to the already delayed and over-budget infrastructure initiative.
content: The new cost range and train speed are being announced as a "reset" of the delayed, over-budget and vastly scaled-back project is carried out.

zh.title: HS2费用可能超过1000亿英镑，列车速度将低于原计划
zh.summary: 英国HS2铁路项目正在进行"重启"，修订后的成本估算超过1000亿英镑，列车速度也低于最初承诺的速度。这是该基础设施项目又一次重大调整。

title: Anthropic and U.S. government to face off in DC court over blacklisting of AI company
summary: Anthropic is challenging the Defense Department in federal court after being designated a supply chain risk. The case highlights increasing government scrutiny of AI startups and their national security implications.
content: Anthropic sued the Defense Department in March after the agency declared the artificial intelligence startup a supply chain risk.

zh.title: Anthropic与美国政府在美国地方法院就人工智能公司黑名单问题对簿公堂
zh.summary: Anthropic在被美国国防部列为供应链风险后，在联邦法院对其提出质证。该案例凸显了政府对人工智能初创企业及其国家安全影响的日益增加的审查。

title: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasurys as Gulf War fallout stokes currency fears
summary: Japan and China are reducing their holdings of U.S. Treasury securities amid the U.S.-Iran conflict, which has driven up crude oil prices and weakened Asian currencies. The capital flight reflects concerns about currency instability in a geopolitical crisis.
content: The selloff came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the Japanese yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.

zh.title: 日本和中国领导外国政府撤出美国国债，波斯湾战争余波引发货币担忧
zh.summary: 在美伊冲突背景下，日本和中国正在减少其美国国债持有量，这导致原油价格上升和亚洲货币贬值。这种资本外逃反映了对地缘政治危机中货币不稳定性的担忧。

title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
summary: The son of Mango fashion group founder Isak Andic, who died in a December 2024 cliff fall, has been arrested in connection with the incident. The circumstances suggest potential criminal liability in what was initially treated as an accident.
content: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.

zh.title: 芒果集团老板之子因父亲从悬崖跌落身亡而被逮捕
zh.summary: 芒果时尚集团创始人伊萨克·安迪克之子因与其父亲在2024年12月从悬崖跌落身亡的事件有关而被逮捕。相关情况表明在最初被视为事故的事件中可能存在刑事责任。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Micron, Costco, StubHub, Broadcom, CrowdStrike & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major recommendations on multiple tech and retail stocks including Nvidia, Tesla, and others, signaling significant trading opportunities. These calls from major investment firms guide investor decisions on key market movers.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师评级：英伟达、特斯拉、美光、好市多、StubHub、博通、CrowdStrike及更多
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对包括英伟达、特斯拉等多只科技和零售股发布了重大建议，预示着重大交易机会。来自主要投资公司的这些评级指导投资者对关键市场参与者的决策。

title: Investors are all-in on stocks, and a June swoon could be next, BofA says
summary: Bank of America warns that investors' record-low cash positions since February 2024 signal potential market vulnerability and a possible pullback in June. The extreme positioning suggests a market correction could be imminent as summer approaches.
content: Investors are at the lowest cash levels since February 2024, just one sign that a market pullback could be coming this summer, warns a BofA survey of fund managers.

zh.title: 投资者全力投入股市，美银表示6月可能出现回调
zh.summary: 美国银行警告称，自2024年2月以来投资者的现金头寸处于创纪录低位，这表明市场可能存在漏洞，6月可能出现回调。这种极端头寸表明，随着夏季临近，市场调整可能迫在眉睫。

title: Home Depot says core shopper is resilient in the face of higher gas prices, sales rise 5%
summary: Home Depot exceeded Wall Street's earnings expectations with 5% sales growth, demonstrating resilience of its core customer base despite elevated fuel costs. The performance indicates consumers continue spending on home improvement despite economic pressures.
content: Home Depot beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, even as some shoppers pulled back on larger projects.

zh.title: Home Depot表示其核心消费者在油价上升面前保持韧性，销售额增长5%
zh.summary: Home Depot超越了华尔街的预期，销售额增长5%，证明了其核心客户群体尽管燃料成本上升但仍保持韧性。这一表现表明消费者尽管面临经济压力仍继续在家装上支出。

title: AI stocks helped the bull power through multiple threats. But now is this market too out of balance?
summary: AI stocks have driven market gains through numerous headwinds, but their dominance raises questions about market concentration risk. The extreme reliance on a single theme may have created structural imbalances that demand urgent reassessment.
content: The dominance of the AI theme has grown so extreme that some very large structural questions now seem urgent and compulsory.

zh.title: 人工智能股票帮助牛市突破多重威胁。但现在市场失衡了吗？
zh.summary: 人工智能股票尽管面临众多逆风，但仍推动了市场上涨，然而其主导地位引发了人们对市场集中风险的担忧。对单一主题的极端依赖可能已经造成了需要立即重新评估的结构性失衡。

title: Petrol hits highest price since start of Iran war
summary: Unleaded petrol reached 158.52 pence per litre, the highest price since the U.S.-Iran conflict began. The RAC warns prices could rise further as geopolitical tensions persist.
content: The average price of unleaded has risen to 158.52p a litre, according to the RAC, who warn that it could rise further in the coming weeks.

zh.title: 汽油价格创伊朗战争以来的新高
zh.summary: 无铅汽油达到每升158.52便士，创伊朗战争开始以来的最高价格。英国汽车协会警告，随着地缘政治紧张局势持续，油价可能进一步上涨。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Home Depot, Amer Sports, Blackstone, Alphabet & more
summary: Several major stocks including Home Depot, American Sports, Blackstone, and Alphabet posted significant premarket trading movements. These early moves signal potential direction for broader market trading during regular hours.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

zh.summary: 包括Home Depot、美国体育公司、黑石集团和Alphabet在内的多只主要股票在盘前交易中出现重大波动。这些早盘走势预示了常规交易时段更广泛的市场交易方向。

title: UK unemployment rate unexpectedly rises
summary: The UK unemployment rate has unexpectedly risen while job vacancies fell to a five-year low, signaling potential economic weakness as geopolitical tensions begin to impact businesses.
content: The number of UK job vacancies also fell to its lowest level in five years as the initial impact of the Iran war on businesses starts to be seen.

zh.title: 英国失业率意外上升
zh.summary: 随着地缘政治紧张局势开始冲击企业，英国失业率意外上升，职位空缺跌至五年来最低水平，预示经济可能面临疲软。

summary: European stock markets are bracing for a mixed opening as traders evaluate the impact of rising UK unemployment and Germany's Uniper privatization against broader geopolitical tensions.

zh.title: 欧洲市场：英国失业率上升；德国启动Uniper私有化

title: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
summary: Elon Musk suffered another courtroom defeat in his case against OpenAI, continuing a recent streak of legal losses.
content: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.

summary: Parents at a Devon school are protesting plans to eliminate school buses at the end of the academic year, citing disruption to student transportation.
content: Parents criticise the Devon school's plan to end school buses at the end of the academic year.

zh.summary: 德文一所学校的家长正在抗议在学年末消除校车的计划，理由是这将扰乱学生的交通。

title: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
summary: Starbucks Korea fired its CEO after a 'Tank Day' promotion campaign was withdrawn due to accusations it referenced a violent historical crackdown.

title: The charity shop which boosted takings by moving outdoors
summary: A UK charity shop increased its daily revenue to £2,000 by shifting to outdoor trading just one day per week, demonstrating innovative retail adaptation.
content: The shop can now make £2,000 in one day after moving to trade outdoors just one day a week.

zh.title: 通过迁至户外增加收入的慈善商店
zh.summary: 一家英国慈善商店通过每周只有一天的户外交易将日收入增加到2000英镑，展示了创新的零售适应能力。

title: Tech investors loved this earnings season — but the Iran war is piling pressure on the companies powering the AI boom
summary: While tech earnings bolstered investor enthusiasm for AI stocks, the chip sector faces rising cost pressures and supply chain constraints related to geopolitical tensions affecting materials access.
content: Stocks continue to rally amid the AI boom, but the chip sector is scrambling to shore up access to key materials as costs rise.

zh.title: 科技投资者喜爱本季度财报 — 但伊朗战争给AI繁荣的推动力施压
zh.summary: 虽然科技企业财报提升了投资者对AI股票的热情，但芯片部门面临与地缘政治紧张局势相关的成本压力上升和供应链制约，这些因素影响了原材料获取。

title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
summary: Standard Chartered plans to cut over 15% of corporate function roles while targeting a 20%+ increase in income per employee by 2028 to boost profitability.
content: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.

zh.title: 渣打银行计划削减超过15%的公司职能职位以实现更高回报
zh.summary: 渣打银行计划削减超过15%的公司职能职位，同时目标是到2028年实现员工人均收入增长20%以上，以提高盈利能力。

title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
summary: Gautam Adani and his Adani Enterprises received legal relief from U.S. authorities following a Treasury settlement over purchases of sanctioned Iranian energy products.
content: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.

zh.title: 美国证监会、财政部和司法部为亿万富翁高塔姆·阿达尼提供法律救济
zh.summary: 高塔姆·阿达尼及其阿达尼企业集团因购买被制裁的伊朗能源产品与美国财政部达成和解，随后获得了美国当局的法律救济。

title: Standard Chartered to cut thousands of roles as AI use increases
summary: Standard Chartered is cutting thousands of jobs as AI adoption accelerates, though the bank plans to reassign affected workers to alternative roles within the organization.
content: The UK-headquartered banking giant aims to move some of the effected workers to other roles in the business.

zh.title: 渣打银行随着AI使用增加将裁减数千个职位
zh.summary: 随着人工智能采用加速，渣打银行正在裁减数千个工作岗位，尽管该银行计划将受影响的员工重新安排到组织内的其他职位。

title: The bond market has a warning for the Fed: Get serious about inflation and potential rate hikes ASAP
summary: Bond market volatility is signaling that the Federal Reserve needs to take aggressive action on inflation and rate hikes to stabilize the Treasury market.
content: Tough talk from the Federal Reserve about rate hikes may be needed to ease the Treasury market’s rout.

zh.title: 债券市场向美联储发出警告：立即严肃对待通胀和可能的加息
zh.summary: 债券市场波动表明，美联储需要对通胀和加息采取积极行动，以稳定美国国债市场。

title: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
summary: Putin's visit to Beijing follows Trump's trip, testing China's ability to balance between the U.S. and Russia while Moscow seeks assurance of China's continued alignment.
content: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.

zh.title: 普京在特朗普之后访问北京，考验中国的平衡外交
zh.summary: 普京对北京的访问紧跟特朗普的访问，考验中国在美国和俄罗斯之间平衡的能力，同时莫斯科寻求中国继续支持的保证。

title: Oil prices fall as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
summary: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Trump announced he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran at the request of key Middle Eastern leaders. The delay reduced concerns about potential supply disruptions and geopolitical escalation in the region.
content: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.

zh.title: 特朗普推迟伊朗打击计划，油价下跌，缓解供应中断担忧
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布他将应中东关键领导人的要求推迟对伊朗的计划军事打击后，油价下跌。这一延迟减少了人们对潜在供应中断和地区地缘政治升级的担忧。

title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
summary: Japan's economy grew at an annualized 2.1% rate in the first quarter, significantly exceeding economist forecasts of 0.4% growth. The result marks improvement from the previous quarter's 0.3% expansion.
content: The figure beat projections of 0.4% from Reuters-polled economists, and against the 0.3% in the last quarter.

zh.title: 日本第一季度经济以年化2.1%的速度增长，超过预期
zh.summary: 日本第一季度经济以年化2.1%的速度增长，远超经济学家预测的0.4%增长。这一结果比上一季度0.3%的增长有所改善。

title: Asia markets open broadly higher as oil eases after Trump delays planned Iran strike
summary: Asian markets opened broadly higher on Tuesday following declines in oil prices after Trump delayed a planned Iran strike. The rally reflects reduced concerns about supply disruptions and geopolitical escalation.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened broadly higher on Tuesday, amid lower oil prices after President Donald Trump said he is postponing a scheduled attack on Iran

zh.title: 特朗普推迟伊朗打击计划，油价下跌后，亚洲市场大幅走高
zh.summary: 在特朗普推迟对伊朗的计划打击后，油价下跌，亚洲市场周二大幅走高。这一反弹反映了人们对供应中断和地缘政治升级担忧的减少。
